rulings.Calendar Matter: ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Conservatorship Due To Death Of Conservatee (Final Report - Waiver Of Accounting)
rulings.Rulings: Hearing. Appearance required. Please have the CASE NUMBER and the CASE NAME ready for the clerk. Parties appearing must check in for the hearing using their FULL NAME. Counsel and parties may appear in person or remotely through Zoom or CourtCall. Please review LRSF 14.1. For Zoom appearance: meeting ID is 160 225 4765 and password is 514879. For audio-only telephone appearance via Zoom, call 1-669-254-5252 and follow the prompts, using the meeting ID and password above. Counsel and parties may appear by audio-only telephone through CourtCall by calling 1-888-882-6878.

rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF LENA MAE RENFRO
rulings.Calendar Matter: ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Accounting #1, Fees, Final Distribution
rulings.Rulings: Continued to 10/23/2024. No original statement for the estate's US Bank account covering 09/17/2024 (ending date of amended account) is on file. Note: Account dashboard printout is not acceptable. In addition, the following issues (e-mailed to counsel on 08/14/2024) remain unaddressed: 1) No corrected final inventory and appraisal has been filed to: i) List $348,691.92 on Attachment 1 as cash assets appraised by the administrator. Item 2 must be corrected to $0. ii) Complete item 5 re property tax certificate. iii) Complete item 7 to state $0 bond as insufficient. 2) No original small estate affidavit re Esma Renfro (but not DeShawn Renfro) signed by Deshawn Renfro's 5 children as direct successors of Esma Renfro is on file. 3) No original small estate affidavit re James Renfro (but not Belinda Renfro) signed by Belinda Renfro's 2 children as indirect successors of James Renfro (through Belinda Renfro's succession) is on file. 4) No original small estate affidavit re Belinda Renfro signed by Charles Faultry as one of the direct successors of Belinda Renfro is on file. 5) No original small estate affidavit re Destiny Walker signed by her 2 siblings as the only successors is on file. The mandatory Judicial Council form DE-300 must be attached to the affidavit, as Destiny Walker died after April 2022.

rulings.Case Title: IN THE MATTER OF THE CONTRERAS FAMILY TRUST, DATED MAY 13, 2019
rulings.Calendar Matter: ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Conference
rulings.Rulings: Hearing. Appearance required. PARTIES APPEARING SHOULD CHECK IN FOR THE HEARING WITH THEIR FULL NAME. Counsel and parties may appear personally or remotely through Zoom or CourtCall. For a video appearance, go to zoom.us, click "join a meeting" and input meeting ID 160 225 4765 and password 514879. For an audio-only appearance through Zoom, call 1-669-254-5252 and key in meeting ID "160 225 4765#", then participant ID "0#", then password "514879#". (Toll rates may apply).) The Court prefers that counsel and parties appearing by video input their first and last name into the "Your Name" dialogue box. Counsel and parties may appear by audio-only telephone through CourtCall by calling 1-888-882-6878. Please review LRSF 14.1(C) for more information.

rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF AUGUSTO B. DELA CRUZ
rulings.Calendar Matter: PETITION FOR SPOUSAL PROPERTY
rulings.Rulings: Hearing. Appearance required. Court to determine whether to grant the petition as prayed, to grant the petition only as it pertains to confirming the surviving spouse's share of the community property, or to require formal administration of the subject property. Please have the CASE NUMBER and the CASE NAME ready for the clerk. Parties appearing must check in for the hearing using their FULL NAME. Counsel and parties may appear in person or remotely through Zoom or CourtCall. Please review LRSF 14.1. For Zoom appearance: meeting ID is 160 225 4765 and password is 514879. For audio-only telephone appearance via Zoom, call 1-669-254-5252 and follow the prompts, using the meeting ID and password above. Counsel and parties may appear by audio-only telephone through CourtCall by calling 1-888-882-6878.

rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF LADD KUBES
rulings.Calendar Matter: PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
rulings.Rulings: Matter will be called to admit will. No appearance is required. Status hearing on close of estate will be set for 10/13/25. No appearance will be necessary on that date if either a petition for final distribution or a petition for approval of report of status of administration pursuant to Probate Code 12200 et seq is filed at least two weeks prior.

rulings.Case Title: IN THE MATTER OF THE DOROTHY JEAN BERNSTEIN STUBBLEFIELD LEWIS IRREVOCABLE TRUST DATED 4/13/22
rulings.Calendar Matter: 1) Compel Trustees To Disclose Trust Assets And Terms 2) Remedy Breach Of Trust By Trustees; 3) Compel An Accounting; 4) Suspend And Remove Trust;
rulings.Rulings: Continued to 11/18/2024. 1) No proposed order has been received or lodged. A copy of the proposed order must be served on each person entitled to notice in contested matters. A proof of service must be filed (as a separate document, but not as an attachment to the proposed order). See LRSF 14.7(A)(4). 2) A copy of the remote appearance information required by LRSF 14.1(C)(6) must be attached to and served with the DE-120 form at least 30 days before the hearing. 3) Please state the petitioner's position as to whether the settlor lacks legal capacity to make decisions within the meaning of Probate Code sections 812 & 1003(a)(2), and if so, whether the Court should or should not appoint a guardian ad litem to represent the settlor's interest.
